# Zhengyi Machinery Vietnam Website

## Site purpose

This is a Vietnamese-language B2B website for Zhengyi Machinery, a manufacturer of industrial machines for roll materials, PVC films, decorative films, laminating, gravure printing, coating, winding and slitting.

The site is not a general plastic machinery directory. It focuses on roll-to-roll industrial equipment for PVC film, plastic film, decorative materials, artificial leather, lightbox fabric, roll flooring and related flexible or semi-rigid materials.

## Main product categories

- Máy in ống đồng trục điện tử: electronic-shaft gravure printing machine for PVC, PP, PET, BOPP, paper and decorative roll materials.
- Máy in trục cơ: mechanical-shaft gravure printing machine for roll materials.
- Máy cán màng công nghiệp / máy ghép màng PVC: industrial laminating machine for PVC film, wood grain film, decorative film and interior surface materials.
- Máy phủ keo vi lõm: micro-gravure coating and laminating machine for PVC, PET, BOPP, PP, functional film, UV coating and adhesive coating.
- Máy cuộn màng PVC trung tâm: high-speed center winding machine for PVC film, flexible film, rigid film, artificial leather and decorative roll materials.
- Máy xẻ cuộn màng nhựa: slitting and rewinding machine for PVC, PP, PET, paper, soft film, rigid film and roll materials.
- Dây chuyền sàn nhựa cuộn: laminating and UV lines for roll flooring materials.
- Máy ghép bạt hộp đèn and bạt kỹ thuật: wide-width laminating/coating equipment for PVC-coated mesh fabric, lightbox fabric and technical tarpaulin.

## Important Vietnamese search topics

- máy cán màng
- máy cán màng công nghiệp
- máy in ống đồng
- máy móc ngành nhựa
- máy móc thiết bị ngành nhựa
- màng nhựa PVC
- màng PVC
- cuộn màng nhựa PVC
- máy phủ keo vi lõm
- máy cuộn màng PVC
- máy xẻ cuộn màng nhựa

- Homepage: `/`
- Product list: `/san-pham.html`
- Plastic machinery industry entry: `/industries/may-moc-thiet-bi-nganh-nhua.html`
- PVC film and decorative material industry page: `/industries/vat-lieu-trang-tri-pvc.html`
- Product specifications table: `/bang-thong-so-san-pham.html`
- Quote request checklist: `/blog/thong-so-can-gui-khi-hoi-gia-may.html`
- Industrial laminating vs mini laminator: `/blog/may-can-mang-cong-nghiep-khac-may-mini.html`
- Gravure printing explanation: `/blog/may-in-ong-dong-la-gi.html`
- Transparent PVC film machine selection: `/blog/mang-nhua-pvc-trong-suot-dung-may-nao.html`
- Plastic machinery process guide: `/blog/may-moc-thiet-bi-nganh-nhua-gom-nhung-gi.html`
- Contact and quotation page: `/lien-he.html`
- Catalogue page: `/catalogue.html`

## Quote request requirements

For an accurate quotation, buyers should provide:

- material type: PVC, PP, PET, BOPP, paper, artificial leather, lightbox fabric, roll flooring or decorative film;
- material width and thickness;
- process required: gravure printing, laminating, adhesive coating, UV coating, drying, winding or slitting;
- target speed or daily output;
- roll diameter, paper core and roll weight if winding/slitting is involved;
- electricity and factory installation conditions;
- product photos, videos or samples if available.

## Company entity

Brand: Zhengyi Machinery

Company: Foshan Gaoming District Zhengyi Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd.

Address: 10 Huifu Road, Hecheng Street, Gaoming District, Foshan, Guangdong, China

Email: info@plasticsmachinevn.com
Website: https://plasticsmachinevn.com/
